metadata.name: LIttle island
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: Ancient seals have been scattered across the land. Recover them from dangerous dungeons and return them to the altar in Nettlemarch to restore the protective ward.

key_dungeons.name: Shattered Grotto
key_dungeons.description: Moss-covered statues flank the entrance to Shattered Grotto. Their blank eyes seem to follow you.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Explore Shattered Grotto and recover the lost Opal Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The artifact was hidden here long ago by a forgotten order.

key_dungeons.name: Flooded Grotto
key_dungeons.description: The air around Flooded Grotto shimmers with faint heat. Strange runes glow along the doorframe.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Brave the depths of Flooded Grotto for the Coral Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Few who enter these halls return unchanged.
